name: relova/core
description: Relova — Universal Data Connector Platform. Virtual-first data federation for Laravel applications.

suggest.ext-pdo_sqlsrv: Required for SQL Server connections (SqlServerDriver) — ships with Microsoft ODBC driver
suggest.ext-pdo_oci: Required for Oracle connections (OracleDriver) — install Oracle Instant Client then pecl install oci8
suggest.ext-pdo_odbc: Required for SAP HANA connections (SapHanaDriver) — install SAP HANA Client (HDBODBC) and enable pdo_odbc in php.ini
suggest.phpoffice/phpspreadsheet: Required for Excel (XLSX) connections (XlsxDriver) — already present if you use maatwebsite/excel
